title: The Witch Hut
description: Adds a witch hut randomly generating in the world, could contain loot !!!
body:
Description: Witch Huts Expanded is a structure and atmosphere enhancement mod that adds fully handcrafted witch huts to the Minecraft world. These huts generate naturally in swamp biomes, dark forests, and other locations associated with magic or eerie ambience. Each hut features custom interiors filled with detailed furniture, potion-crafting equipment, magical decorations, and environmental storytelling elements that help make each location feel unique and lived-in.

The mod introduces several types of witches, each with their own personality and behavior. Some witches are hostile and protect their territory fiercely, others remain neutral unless provoked, and rare special witches act as magical traders who offer unique potions, rare ingredients, and enchanted items not found in standard village trades. These interactions give players more reasons to explore and revisit these structures.

Every witch hut contains a randomized loot table that may include potion ingredients, enchanted books, spell components, ritual items, alchemy materials, and other magic-related valuables. Some huts may also include hidden compartments or secret chests containing rarer treasures.

Beyond the structures themselves, the mod aims to enrich world exploration by adding lore, environmental hints, and subtle worldbuilding touches that make the witch huts feel naturally integrated into their biomes. The design goal is to expand Minecraft’s magical atmosphere without breaking the game's vanilla style.

The mod is compatible with a wide range of Minecraft versions and can be used with NeoForge, Forge, or Fabric mod loaders. It is lightweight, performance-friendly, and designed to work well alongside biome, magic, and world-generation mods.




### ⭐ Features (text-first, accessible) - **Spawns:** Witch huts generate in **Swamps** and other **magic-touched biomes**. - **Witches:** Each hut includes a witch NPC. Behaviors vary — some are **hostile**, some **neutral**, and rare witches may act as **magical traders**. - **Loot:** Huts contain **randomized magical loot** such as spell books, enchanted potions, and potion ingredients.

### 📥 Installation (plain text) **Supported Minecraft versions:** 1.16.5, 1.17.1, 1.18.2, 1.19.2, 1.19.4, 1.20.1, 1.20.4, 1.20.6, 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.5, 1.21.8 **Works with:** NeoForge • Forge • Fabric
